# Disfluencies

> [...] phenomena that interrupt the flow of speech and do not add prepositional content to an utterance .right[Fox Tree (1995)]

--
.pull-left[.middle-left[
- long pauses
- repeated words or phrases
- restarted sentences
- the fillers *uh* and *um*
]]

.pull-right[.middle-right[
.center[![:scale 50%](img/disfluency.svg)
]]]


???
- talk about the "dys"/"dis" distinction
---
# What do disfluencies do?
